children.text: calculate (in accordance with subsection (b)) the cumulative plant replacement value of the total inventory of covered facilities on each military installation under the jurisdiction of the Secretary concerned; and

invest in the budget for facilities sustainment, restoration, and modernization of that military department, a total amount equal to not less than the percentage specified in subsection (c) of the cumulative plant replacement value described in paragraph (1).

children.heading: .—Exclusion
children.label: b .—Exclusion
children.text: In making any calculation pursuant to paragraph (1) of subsection (a), each Secretary of a military department shall exclude any covered facility under the jurisdiction of such Secretary that is scheduled for demolition during the two-year period beginning after the date of such calculation.
for fiscal year 2030 and each subsequent fiscal year, 4 percent.
a certification to the congressional defense committees that the military department is in compliance with this section; and

a list of covered facilities under the jurisdiction of that Secretary, disaggregated by military installation and location, that are scheduled for demolition during the two-year period beginning after the date of the submission of such budget, which shall include cost and schedule estimates.

children.label: A
children.text: a facility identified as closed, disposed of, or scheduled for divestment from the inventory of the Department of Defense;

children.label: i
children.text: a facility leased by the Department; and

children.label: ii
children.text: a facility in which the Department has a lesser property interest under a governing legal instrument; or

children.label: ii
children.text: amounts appropriated or otherwise made available for military family housing.
